metadata.title: Hardware Store | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered hardware store management platform for all your retail operations — from point of sale and inventory management to loyalty programs and multi-channel sales.

hero.title: Hardware Store
hero.description: AdonERP covers all the software needs for your hardware store, from online and in-store transactions to order management and inventory control.
hero.testimonialQuote: It's great to see how technology solutions like AdonERP can streamline operations and enhance productivity for businesses in the hardware retail industry.

interfaceSection.description: An efficient point-of-sale that lets anyone master AdonERP POS in minutes, adapt to any configuration, and focus on what matters: the customer.

flexibleConfig.title: Flexible product configuration.
flexibleConfig.description: Hardware comes in all configurations. Display more variants by configuring memory, components, and other variables.

effortlessStock.title: Effortless stock management.
effortlessStock.description: Real-time inventory updates and automatic replenishment keep you ahead.

loyaltySection.title: Boost
loyaltySection.description: Loyalty programs improve your clients' shopping experience. Handle products from around the world and reward repeat customers.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Smart tools to run hardware retail, stock management, payments, and delivery from one place.

list.title: All devices welcome
list.description: Works perfectly on tablets, laptops, desktops, and industrial scanners.

list.title: Physical inventory
list.description: Conduct cycle counts and full inventory audits with ease.

list.title: Multiple cashiers
list.description: Manage several cashier accounts with badges or PIN codes.

list.title: Website domain name
list.description: Get a professional domain name included with your online store.

list.title: All payment methods
list.description: Accept cash, cards, e-wallets, and contactless payments.

list.title: Shipping integrations
list.description: Connect with major carriers for seamless delivery management.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your hardware retail operation, finance, supplier flows, and customer communication.

testimonials.name: PT Global Teknologi Niaga
testimonials.content: It's great to see how technology solutions like AdonERP can streamline operations and enhance productivity for businesses in the hardware retail industry.

testimonials.name: Michael Zhang
testimonials.content: From inventory management to multi-channel sales, AdonERP handles everything. Our team mastered the POS in just one day.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for hardware retailers.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a hardware store workflow that helps your team sell faster, manage inventory smarter, and scale from one location to many.
